companies.shortDescription:

SmartFactory Kaiserslautern employs 33 people (-9.4% YoY, -5 people), founded in 2005. Headquartered in Kaiserslautern, Germany.

Die SmartFactory-KL ist ein Forschungs- und Industrienetzwerk, das auf drei Säulen ruht, einem Verein und zwei wissenschaftlichen Einrichtungen. In der Technologie-Initiative SmartFactory KL e.V. sind Forschungsinstitute und Industrieunternehmen Mitglied. Der Verein steht für Fragen in industrieller Produktionsnähe, die in den wissenschaftlichen Forschungseinrichtungen Innovative Fabriksysteme (IFS) am DFKI und am Lehrstuhl Werkzeugmaschinen und Steuerung (WSKL) an der TU Kaiserslautern beantwortet werden. Seit 2019 ist Prof. Dr.-Ing. Martin Ruskowski organisatorische und inhaltliche Klammer. Er ist Vorstandsvorsitzender des Vereins, Leiter des DFKI-Forschungsbereiches und Inhaber des Lehrstuhles. The CODESYS Group is the manufacturer of CODESYS, the hardware-independent automation software according to IEC 61131-3, and is one of the world's leading software providers in industrial automation. Approximately 250 employees work at the company's headquarters in Kempten and at its branches in China, Italy, and the USA.
[...]
Founded in 1994 by Dieter Hess and Manfred Werner, the company's customers come from all areas of automation: manufacturers of industrial controllers as well as users who automate machines and systems with CODESYS.
[...]
Core products include the CODESYS Development System, the associated platform-independent control system CODESYS Control for virtually any system platform, and the Industry 4.0 platform CODESYS Automation Server. The engineering of edge or cloud controllers and data exchange in IIoT networks is part of the standard functionality in CODESYS. FASTEC GmbH, based in Paderborn, employs more than 90 people. The leading provider of IT solutions for production companies has been supporting its customers on the path to digital transformation since 1995. The company sees itself as a solution partner for the factories of the future. The modular Manufacturing Execution System (MES) FASTEC 4 PRO is used by around 400 companies worldwide. Its well-known customers include food producers, pharmaceutical companies, automotive suppliers and toy manufacturers. The holistic digitalisation of production enables them to optimise their workflows and reduce their costs in the long term. The system offers functions for machine and production data acquisition, production planning, maintenance, quality assurance and traceability.

We are a supplier of a Manufacturing Execution System (MES) for the manufacturing industry. With the software product "MES-Software EMC", the company occupies a leading position in individual industries. EMC is a synonym for success (E) resulting from machine efficiency (M) and controlling (C). 

The modular MES software EMC for detailed production planning, operating, machine and process data acquisition (PDA/MDA/PDA) as well as monitoring and reporting enables the support and optimization of integrated production processes. The MES software EMC acts as a central information hub and ensures transparent production processes, flexibility and cost efficiency by integrating production data.
